title: Shall I Forget?
content:
Shall I forget on this side of the grave?
    I promise nothing: you must wait and see
        Patient and brave.
    (O my soul, watch with him and he with me.)

    Shall I forget in peace of Paradise?
    I promise nothing: follow, friend, and see
        Faithful and wise.
    (O my soul, lead the way he walks with me.)
meaning: About: Christina Georgina Rossetti was a British poet, who wrote a variety of romantic, devotional, and children's poems. She is best known for her long poem Goblin Market, her love poem "Remember", and for her Christmas poem "In the Bleak Midwinter".
